notes: This round focused narrowly on priority threads 1424398 and 882423 and tried to surface thread-level method/production signals rather than broad repo-wide background.
Both sources succeeded in this round.
Some snippets still represent page-level or thread-level search excerpts and should not be treated as full-page archival captures.

items.title: 【鸭老师】三句话，让我推掉了一个月赚20万的AI动漫的小项目（避坑帖）
items.excerpt: 先看我的教程，然后按照教程去临摹一个你想学习制作的作品，然后在做一个原创作品，在这个过程中你就掌握AI了，看多少课程都不如自己去做一下来的快。
items.whyItMatters: Useful direct-practice learning signal: tutorial -> imitation -> original work, with a clear bias toward hands-on making over passive course consumption.

items.title: 【鸭老师】三句话，让我推掉了一个月赚20万的AI动漫的小项目（避坑帖） / 第5页
items.excerpt: 鸭老师我是美工，之前做直播贴片多。求带！ ... 首先生图怎么都听不懂人话，简单的换个衣服都换不好，下载只有1k。
items.whyItMatters: Not suitable as a yalaoshi viewpoint quote, but useful as thread context showing the thread is attracting practitioners looking for workflow help.

items.title: 【鸭老师】新的AI动画第一集做好了，人物完全保持一致性 / 第2页
items.excerpt: 我就是想看看ai能不能起流量，如果不行就开始用ai辅助出图，画师再图片的基础上修改，这样不用动脑去搞从0的原创挺快捷的，我这里有两个画师还没用起来。
items.whyItMatters: Strengthens the interpretation that he treats AI-only production as conditional and keeps an AI-plus-human repair/collaboration fallback ready.
